description: The Assembly of Experts (Majles-e Khobregan-e Rahbari) is an 88-member body of senior clerics elected by popular vote for eight-year terms. Its constitutional mandate is to select, supervise, and if necessary dismiss the Supreme Leader. All candidates must be vetted by the [Guardian Council](/orgs/guardian-council). In practice, it has never exercised its supervisory or dismissal powers. It is chaired by a speaker elected from among its members.
editorial_notes: Members elected by popular vote but heavily vetted by Guardian Council.
